signals.reasoning: This is a fresh SOL short re-entry that is already underwater while BTC, ETH, and SOL are all pressing to new intraday highs. With no stop installed, a live geopolitical veto still active, and liquidation distance under 1%, this should be cut quickly before it grows into another cleanup problem.
BTC is strong and breakout-supported, which directly argues against defending the SOL short, but position management here is still about flattening the open risk first.
ETH is also pushing higher with BTC, so it is not a better immediate action than simply closing the losing SOL short.
PNUT is recovering well, but it is still just another rebound name and not where disciplined focus should go while open risk is wrong-way.
LDO has good recovery structure, but it is not a better immediate decision than flattening the bad SOL position.
AAVE is one of the stronger trend names here, but the live veto and already-extended rebound keep it in watch-only territory.
BOME is too stretched and too high beta to justify attention over just fixing the open SOL mistake.
AR is constructive, but it is still just a rebound continuation candidate and not worth forcing under a live event brake.
TST remains too extended and too crowded to justify a fresh signal in this context.
KNEIRO has incomplete market data in the request snapshot, so it should stay off-limits.
